interactivity.description: Projects and Studies that explore design solutions that bridge between the digital and the tangible.

publicRealm.description: Work that ambitions to improve the public environment through interventions in different design scales.

userOriented.description: A project that results on a taxonomy exercise of the user in order to create an environment that would represent them.

dataDriven.description: Solutions that ambition to unveil insights that help to make design-driven decisions, as well as storytelling pieces.

strategy.description: Ideas and Conceptualization of the solutions to a problem in predetermined range of time, and that would create an exciting and hopeful future.

places.description: Projects and studies which ultimate goal is to improve and engage the user experience.
